data.title: Write structural test asserting onboarding SKILL.md defines exactly 6 named batch groups
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Write tests/hooks/test-onboarding-batch-groups.sh that checks the structural boundary of plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md.

Given: the onboarding SKILL.md exists at its canonical plugin path
When: the file is scanned for '## Batch Group N:' section markers
Then: exactly 6 are present, each has a non-empty group name after the colon, and no two have identical names

This test must FAIL before Task 2 adds the group headers (the groups do not exist yet). It turns GREEN after the SKILL.md is restructured.

Per Behavioral Testing Standard Rule 5 (instruction files), this is a structural boundary test — not a content assertion. The section header '## Batch Group N:' is the deterministic interface contract.

RED marker exemption: cited criterion is Rule 5 (non-executable instruction file; structural boundary test). The test itself is executable shell — it checks structural markers, not instruction content.

Update .test-index with RED marker [test_onboarding_has_exactly_6_batch_groups] for plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md before committing.

## Implementation Steps
1. Create tests/hooks/test-onboarding-batch-groups.sh (executable)
2. Scan PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md for lines matching ^## Batch Group [0-9]+:
3. Count matches — assert exactly 6
4. For each match, extract the name after the colon — assert non-empty
5. Assert no duplicate names
6. Run with PLUGIN_ROOT pointing to the plugin cache path or repo path
7. chmod +x tests/hooks/test-onboarding-batch-groups.sh
8. Add to .test-index: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md: tests/hooks/test-onboarding-batch-groups.sh [test_onboarding_has_exactly_6_batch_groups]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/hooks/test-onboarding-batch-groups.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-onboarding-batch-groups.sh
- [ ] Test fails (exit non-zero) when run against unmodified SKILL.md (RED state)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-onboarding-batch-groups.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_onboarding_has_exactly_6_batch_groups] for plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
  Verify: grep '\[test_onboarding_has_exactly_6_batch_groups\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
